title: Alternative Asset Listing
description: Listing for an alternative asset such as art, wine, watches, sports cards, sneakers, or other collectibles.

item_name.description: Name or title of the item. Commonly found in: auction listing, marketplace listing.

item_type.description: Category of the alternative asset. Commonly found in: auction category, marketplace category.

artist_or_maker.description: Artist, brand, or maker of the item. Commonly found in: listing details, auction catalog.

title_or_model.description: Title of artwork or model name/number. Commonly found in: listing title, auction catalog.

year.description: Year of creation or manufacture. Commonly found in: listing details, auction catalog.

condition_grade.description: Condition or grade of the item. Commonly found in: listing details, grading service report.

authentication_status.description: Whether the item has been authenticated. Commonly found in: listing details, authentication certificate.

authentication_provider.description: Name of the authentication or grading service. Commonly found in: listing details, authentication certificate.

platform.description: Name of the marketplace or auction platform. Commonly found in: platform name from URL, listing metadata.

listing_type.description: Type of sale mechanism. Commonly found in: listing page, sale type indicator.

estimate_low_usd.description: Low end of auction house price estimate in USD. Commonly found in: auction catalog, estimate section.

estimate_high_usd.description: High end of auction house price estimate in USD. Commonly found in: auction catalog, estimate section.

starting_bid_usd.description: Starting bid for auction in USD. Commonly found in: auction listing.

current_bid_usd.description: Current highest bid in USD (for live auctions). Commonly found in: live auction page.

buy_now_price_usd.description: Fixed buy-now price in USD. Commonly found in: buy now listing.

currency.description: Currency code for the listed prices. Commonly found in: listing price display.

auction_date.description: Date of the auction. Commonly found in: auction listing, event calendar.

sale_result_usd.description: Final sale price in USD (post-auction). Commonly found in: auction results page.

images.description: URLs of item images. Commonly found in: listing images.

description.description: Full description of the item. Commonly found in: listing description, auction catalog notes.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
